_instructions: Copy this file to firebase_config.json (which is git-ignored) and fill it in.
1. Firebase console -> create/open a project -> Build -> Realtime Database -> Create.
3. For a quick demo set the database Rules to test mode (read/write true) and leave 'auth' empty.
PREFER setting the secret via the FIREBASE_AUTH environment variable instead of this file,
so a long-lived database secret never lands in source control.
4. Restart the server and open /status -> firebase.status should read 'ok'.
